page_metadata.biotools__summary: CellProfiler Analyst allows interactive exploration and analysis of data, particularly from high-throughput, image-based experiments. Included is a supervised machine learning system which can be trained to recognize complex and subtle phenotypes, for automatic scoring of millions of cells
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CellProfiler Analyst allows interactive exploration and analysis of data, particularly from high-throughput, image-based experiments. Included is a supervised machine learning system which can be trained to recognize complex and subtle phenotypes, for automatic scoring of millions of cells
